TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jake_Bornheimer, title = Jake_Bornheimer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jake_Bornheimer} }

S.FORM: Jake Bornheimer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Jake Bornheimer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1986) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jake Bornheimer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Jake Bornheimer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1986) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ake βornħeimer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ake βornħeimer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
